title: Smoky French Gratin
description: A creamy, cheesy gratin with a smoky twist, perfect for a comforting dinner. Rich, smooth emmentaler cheese is the star of the show, with a hint of smokiness to elevate the dish.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the cream, smoky paprika, salt, and black pepper. Heat over medium heat until the mixture starts to simmer.
In a separate saucepan, melt the emmentaler cheese over low heat, stirring occasionally.
Gradually pour the hot cream mixture into the melted cheese, stirring constantly.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs or a sprinkle of paprika, if desired.
